gitlab-prepare.description: Prepares a checked out repository for analysis without editing tracked files.

gitlab-review.description: Reviews merge requests for correctness, risks, and test gaps.

deep_review.description: Runs evidence-driven merge request review by executing repository checks where useful.

oc_review.description: Review the current GitLab thread or merge request.
oc_review.template:
Review the current GitLab thread or merge request.

$ARGUMENTS

oc_deepreview.description: Run preparation and deep evidence-driven review for the current GitLab thread or merge request.
oc_deepreview.template:
Run preparation and deep evidence-driven review for the current GitLab thread or merge request.

$ARGUMENTS
